lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree guaareree mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Gauree Gwaarayree, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਨਿਹਕੇਵਲ ਨਿਰਬਾਣੀ ॥੪॥੧੩॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate nihakeval nirabaanee |4|13|33|
lines.english: O Nanak, attuned to the Naam, the Name of the Lord, they are detached, in the perfect balance of Nirvaanaa. ||4||13||33||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਭਾਗਿ ਸੰਜੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: satigur milai vaddabhaag sanjog |
lines.english: Through great good fortune and high destiny, one meets the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਤ ਹਰਿ ਰਸ ਭੋਗ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hiradai naam nit har ras bhog |1|
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is constantly within the heart, and one enjoys the sublime essence of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh praanee naam har dhiaae |
lines.english: O mortal, become Gurmukh, and meditate on the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੁ ਜੀਤਿ ਲਾਹਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: janam jeet laahaa naam paae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Be victorious in the game of life, and earn the profit of the Naam. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਹੈ ਮੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: giaan dhiaan gurasabad hai meetthaa |
lines.english: Spiritual wisdom and meditation come to those unto whom the Word of the Guru's Shabad is sweet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bin naavai dhrig dhrig ahankaar |3|
lines.english: but without the Name, the egotistical ones are cursed and doomed. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਕਿਨੈ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਚਖਿ ਡੀਠਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te kinai viralai chakh ddeetthaa |2|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, a few have tasted, and seen it. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਕਾਂਡ ਬਹੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਅਚਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: karam kaandd bahu kareh achaar |
lines.english: They may perform all sorts of religious rituals and good actions,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਛੂਟੈ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਗਾਸ ॥੪॥੧੪॥੩੪॥
lines.translit: jan naanak chhoottai gur paragaas |4|14|34|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, they shall be released only by Guru's Grace. ||4||14||34||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਧਨਿ ਬਾਧਿਓ ਮਾਇਆ ਫਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: bandhan baadhio maaeaa faas |
lines.english: They are bound and gagged, and hung by Maya's noose;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਗਉੜੀ ਬੈਰਾਗਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 3 gaurree bairaagan |
lines.english: Third Mehl, Gauree Bairaagan:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੀ ਧਰਤੀ ਊਪਰਿਮੇਘੁਲਾ ਬਰਸਤੁ ਹੈ ਕਿਆ ਧਰਤੀ ਮਧੇ ਪਾਣੀ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaisee dharatee aooparimeghulaa barasat hai kiaa dharatee madhe paanee naahee |
lines.english: The clouds pour their rain down upon the earth, but isn't there water within the earth as well?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੇ ਧਰਤੀ ਮਧੇ ਪਾਣੀ ਪਰਗਾਸਿਆ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਗਾ ਵਰਸਤ ਫਿਰਾਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaise dharatee madhe paanee paragaasiaa bin pagaa varasat firaahee |1|
lines.english: Water is contained within the earth; without feet, the clouds run around and let down their rain. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਤੂੰ ਐਸੇ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa toon aise bharam chukaahee |
lines.english: O Baba, get rid of your doubts like this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਤੁ ਹੈ ਸੋਈ ਕੋਈ ਹੈ ਰੇ ਤੈਸੇ ਜਾਇ ਸਮਾਹੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh karat hai soee koee hai re taise jaae samaahee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: As you act, so shall you become, and so you shall go and mingle. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸਤਰੀ ਪੁਰਖ ਹੋਇ ਕੈ ਕਿਆ ਓਇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: eisataree purakh hoe kai kiaa oe karam kamaahee |
lines.english: As woman or man, what can anyone do?

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤਨੇ ਜਨਮ ਭੂਲਿ ਪਰੇ ਸੇ ਜਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਤਾ ਭੂਲੇ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: eitane janam bhool pare se jaa paaeaa taa bhoole naahee |
lines.english: In countless incarnations, I went astray. Now that I have found You, I shall no longer wander.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਾ ਰੂਪ ਸਦਾ ਹਹਿ ਤੇਰੇ ਤੁਝ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanaa roop sadaa heh tere tujh hee maeh samaahee |2|
lines.english: The many and various forms are always Yours, O Lord; they shall merge again into You. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਤੂੰਹੈ ਹਹਿ ਆਪੇ ਭਰਮੁ ਕਹਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: teraa sabad toonhai heh aape bharam kahaahee |
lines.english: The Shabad is Yours; You are Yourself. Where is there any doubt?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਾ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਸੋਈ ਪਰੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਜੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਹੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jaa kaa kaaraj soee par jaanai je gur kai sabad samaahee |3|
lines.english: It is His work; those who are absorbed in the Word of the Guru's Shabad come to know it well. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਬੈਰਾਗਣਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree bairaagan mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Gauree Bairaagan, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਤੁ ਤਤ ਸਿਉ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਪੁਨਰਪਿ ਜਨਮਿ ਨ ਆਹੀ ॥੪॥੧॥੧੫॥੩੫॥
lines.translit: naanak tat tat siau miliaa punarap janam na aahee |4|1|15|35|
lines.english: O Nanak, one whose essence is merged with the Lord's essence does not have to enter the cycle of reincarnation again. ||4||1||15||35||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਕਾਲੈ ਵਸਿ ਹੈ ਬਾਧਾ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jag kaalai vas hai baadhaa doojai bhaae |
lines.english: The whole world is under the power of Death, bound by the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: haumai karam kamaavade manamukh milai sajaae |1|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do their deeds in ego; they receive their just rewards. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man gur charanee chit laae |
lines.english: O my mind, focus your consciousness on the Guru's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਲੈ ਦਰਗਹ ਲਏ ਛਡਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam nidhaan lai daragah le chhaddaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, you shall be awarded the treasure of the Naam. In the Court of the Lord, you shall be saved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਭਰਮਦੇ ਮਨਹਠਿ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh bharamade manahatth aavai jaae |
lines.english: Through 8.4 million incarnations, people wander lost; in stubborn-mindedness, they come and go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਚੀਨਿਓ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੋਨੀ ਪਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad na cheenio fir fir jonee paae |2|
lines.english: They do not realize the Word of the Guru's Shabad; they are reincarnated over and over again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh aap pachhaaniaa har naam vasiaa man aae |
lines.english: The Gurmukh understands his own self. The Lord's Name comes to dwell within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਭਗਤੀ ਰਤਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੇ ਸੁਖਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: anadin bhagatee ratiaa har naame sukh samaae |3|
lines.english: Imbued with devotion to the Lord's Name, night and day, he merges in peace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰੈ ਪਰਤੀਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਹਉਮੈ ਤਜੇ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: man sabad marai parateet hoe haumai taje vikaar |
lines.english: When one's mind dies in the Shabad, one radiates faith and confidence, shedding egotism and corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਮੀ ਪਾਈਅਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਭਗਤਿ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥੪॥੨॥੧੬॥੩੬॥
lines.translit: jan naanak karamee paaeean har naamaa bhagat bhanddaar |4|2|16|36|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, through the karma of good actions, the treasure of devotional worship and the Name of the Lord are attained. ||4||2||16||36||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਈਅੜੈ ਦਿਨ ਚਾਰਿ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: peeearrai din chaar hai har har likh paaeaa |
lines.english: The Lord, Har, Har, has ordained that the soul is to stay in her parents' home for only a few short days.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਬੈਰਾਗਣਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree bairaagan mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Gauree Bairaagan, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਣੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh sehaj samaaneea har har man bhaaeaa |1|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs are intuitively absorbed into the Lord. The Lord is pleasing to their minds. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਵਕੜੈ ਗੁਣ ਸੰਮਲੈ ਸਾਹੁਰੈ ਵਾਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: pevakarrai gun samalai saahurai vaas paaeaa |
lines.english: She who cultivates virtue in her parents' home, shall obtain a home at her in-laws.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਭਾਵੰਤੀ ਨਾਰਿ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sobhaavantee naar hai guramukh gun gaaeaa |
lines.english: Glorious is that soul-bride, who as Gurmukh, sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਅਲਖੁ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਾਈਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aap niranjan alakh hai aape melaaeeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Immaculate Lord Himself is unseen. He unites us with Himself. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਸੁਰੈ ਪੇਈਐ ਪਿਰੁ ਵਸੈ ਕਹੁ ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sasurai peeeai pir vasai kahu kit bidh paaeeai |
lines.english: Our Husband Lord dwells in this world, and in the world beyond. Tell me, how can He be found?
